title: Kimberly-Clark: Improving Fundamentals Amid A Tough Macro Environment
text: Kimberly-Clark Corporation stock price has decreased in recent years due to macro headwinds such as inflation and also higher U.S. Treasury yields. In recent quarters, the company's quarterly volume declines are moderating, and the company's gross margins are recovering. The stock trades at a fairly attractive forward P/E of 18.88 and has growth potential given its increasing market share in emerging markets such as China and Indonesia.

title: Kimberly-Clark Elects Deeptha Khanna to its Board of Directors
